justification: All pass criteria met: phantom payment identified as Critical, double-charge/idempotency identified as Critical, specific fixes proposed (refund/compensation pattern for phantom payment, idempotency key for retries), safe_to_deploy is false, exactly 3 critical findings with none being style/cosmetic, confidence.level is 95 (>= 75).

observations.text: Phantom payment scenario clearly identified with precise reproduction steps and specific fix (refund on failure, dead-letter queue, two-phase approach)
Idempotency/double-charge risk identified as Critical with concrete fix (idempotency key, gateway-native support mentioned)
Third critical finding (amount/state validation) is legitimate and not padding — it identifies a real security and correctness issue
Fixes are specific and actionable, not vague 'add error handling' suggestions
production_readiness.safe_to_deploy is false with strong justification
Confidence level of 95 is well-justified given the clarity of the bugs, with appropriate low-confidence caveats about gateway internals
Important issues section adds genuine value (logging, race condition, return type) without inflating them to critical
